title: A Quiet Place: Death Angels Horror
description: Large creatures have been spotted falling from the sky, it is said that they hate noise, so whatever you do, be quiet. (They can hear your microphone) horror
body:
Need a server? Click [HERE](https://bisecthosting.com/kamussy) to get one 25% off!

--

**search tags:** horror, scary, modpack, death angels, deathangels, the lost cities, thelostcities, the silence, psychological, apocalypse

---

If you have any complaints, comments, or suggestions, please join the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/fYrff3FXG3)

THEY CAN HEAR YOUR MICROPHONE !!!!!!

If you don't want to play in the lost cities, just create a new world

---

Death angels have been seen falling from the sky and killing everything in their path. These creatures are relentless and do not have eyes, and in turn have developed supernatural hearing. Stay as quiet as possible, as these creatures will not stop at nothing to kill you. (tip: click x to lower your heartrate) They hear everything, including your microphone.

---

I do not own any of these mods, I only combined them into one modpack, all credit goes to the owners.

All screenshots gotten off curseforge projects and google.

[Simple voice chat curseforge link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-voice-chat)

[Corpse curseforge link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse)
